problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier may resolve How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 16 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
